message:
test(fuzz): add einsum subscript parsing fuzz target

Fuzz UFuncArray::einsum with arbitrary subscript strings and
various operand configurations to catch edge cases in einsum
subscript parsing and validation logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@ edition = "2024"
 cargo-fuzz = true
 
 [dependencies]
+fnp-dtype = { path = "../crates/fnp-dtype" }
 fnp-io = { path = "../crates/fnp-io" }
 fnp-ufunc = { path = "../crates/fnp-ufunc" }
 libfuzzer-sys = "0.4.10"
@@ -40,5 +41,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "einsum_subscripts"
+path = "fuzz_targets/einsum_subscripts.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
